title: Ultimate Compression
description: Getting tired of the constant chest monsters and overflowing storage systems? Ultimate Compression is a mod created to reduce storage requirements by compressing almost all vanilla Minecraft blocks & items! The mod also includes custom tools and armor created with the compressed variants of ingots and their respective ores, with increased durability and effects.
body:
![UC Banner](https://i.imgur.com/xKiD7GF.png)

![Info](https://i.imgur.com/QOBlv9C.png)
Checkout the original mod page on CurseForge: [Ultimate Compression](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ultimate-compression).

Getting tired of the constant chest monsters and overflowing storage systems? Ultimate Compression is a mod created to reduce storage requirements by compressing almost all vanilla Minecraft blocks & items! The mod also includes custom tools and armor created with the compressed variants of ingots and their respective ores, with increased durability and effects.

![Documentation](https://i.imgur.com/F2pEPnn.png)

![Upcoming](https://i.imgur.com/LDBgiKw.png)

![Useful Links](https://i.imgur.com/GQkD8uj.png)
